sqlMap.select: select * from rangevalue where fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into rangevalue(fieldno, structureno low high meaning seq ) values (#fieldno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC# #low# #high# #meaning# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('rangevalue') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select rangevalueno, low, high, meaning, seq, fieldno, structureno from rangevalue where rangevalueno = #rangevalueno# and fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update rangevalue set
low = #low# low = null high = #high# high = null meaning = #meaning# meaning = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where rangevalueno = #rangevalueno# and fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from rangevalue where rangevalueno = #rangevalueno# and fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from rangevalue where fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select rangevalueno, low, high, meaning, seq, fieldno, structureno from rangevalue where rangevalueno = #rangevalueno# and fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
select rangevalueno, fieldno, structureno, low, high, meaning, seq from rangevalue where fieldno = #fieldno# and structureno = #structureno#
